creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->feedback

OK, so it wasn't that simple.  Can you please run (in your shell): make 
-C /usr/ports/security/maia -V WRKDIR |xargs rm -r  , try again, and 
then if that fails, please paste the output of grep .FreeBSD: 
/usr/ports/security/maia/Makefile
